description.para: For PL-Microblaze, read from RTCA; for APU/RPU, use xparameters macro

briefdescription.para: PSU PSS reference clock definition in Hz.
Timeout in term of number of times status register polled to check eFUSE read operation complete.
Timeout in term of number of times status register polled to check eFUSE programming operation complete.
Timeout in term of number of times status register polled to check eFuse Cache load is done.
Timeout in term of number of times status register polled to check eFuse Crc check id done.

This file contains NVM library eFUSE controller register definitions.
